blurb: Protection Warrior is TBC arena's most annoying babysitter — Devastate pressure is minimal, but Concussion Blow, Shield Bash, Spell Reflection and Intervene turn you into a walking peel machine for drain comps. The few protection warriors on the ladder gear almost pure survivability and win through attrition.
statPriorityRationale: Protection's value is unkillable disruption, so the list leans almost entirely defensive — the damage was never the point; the endless stuns, silences and intervene peels are.

faq.question: What rating are these Protection Warriors?
faq.answer: This snapshot covers 3 Protection Warriors between 2329 and 2502 rating (average 2412) on the TBC Classic arena ladder, refreshed from public leaderboard data.

faq.question: What is the most-used Protection Warrior PvP gear right now?
faq.answer: The highest-consensus picks are Bloodlust Brooch (100%), Veteran's Pendant of Triumph (67%), Sergeant's Heavy Cloak (67%). Anything above ~70% usage at this rating range is effectively mandatory.

faq.question: How much of the Protection Warrior BiS list is PvP gear vs raid gear?
faq.answer: Only 47% of the most-used slots are PvP items — high-rated Protection Warriors flex real raid pieces into this list, so check the per-slot alternatives before spending points on a marginal upgrade.

faq.question: What weapon do Protection Warriors use in arena?
faq.answer: Mallet of the Tides is the main-hand of choice (67% of surveyed players).

faq.question: What gems do Protection Warriors socket for PvP?
faq.answer: Across all sockets, the most-used gems in this snapshot are +12 Stamina, +18 Stamina & 5% Stun Resist, +8 Critical Strike Rating. Socket bonuses are usually ignored unless they align with these.
